title: Echoing WebSocket Messages
statement: Create a WebSocket endpoint that echoes back any message sent to it. When a client connects, it should send a welcome message. When a client disconnects, it should send a goodbye message. You can use the Express framework with the built-in WebSocket library.
constraints: Must use the express-ws library to handle WebSockets
Must handle incoming messages and send them back to the client

endpoints.description: Health check endpoint, returns 200 if the server is up
WebSocket endpoint that echoes back messages sent by clients
